## Description

Please include a summary of the changes and the related issue.

Fixes #(issue)

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Refactoring
- [ ] CI/CD

## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the project's code style
- [ ] I have updated the CHANGELOG
- [ ] Backend builds successfully (`bun run backend:build`)
- [ ] Extension builds successfully (`bun run extension:build`)
